abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Honorable
abilities.text: Models ignore all (+) and (-) during opposed duels with this model.

abilities.name: Kinetic Amplifier
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce that damage by 2 and then move up to 2".

actions.name: Crater Impact
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is at a higher elevation than the target, it may place into base contact with the target to deal +1 damage.

triggers.name: Get in There
triggers.text: A non-unique friendly model in LoS of the target may move up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.

triggers.name: Inspire Valor
triggers.text: Instead of this model declaring an action, an ally moved by this action may declare any action.

triggers.name: Feather Drop
triggers.text: When resolving, models moved by this action are not dealt falling damage.

actions.name: To the Rooftops
actions.effects: Place this model within 4" of its current location on top of the chosen piece of terrain.
